iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 21 auto - DETERRENT. Enrichment 'obliterated' per IC. Nuclear doctrine unchanged. Gabbard testimony controversy. No nuclear program rebuilding. Updated 2026-03-20T07:04:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 21 auto - IMMINENT. Netanyahu: Israel acted alone on South Pars, Trump asked to stop energy strikes, Israel complying. Netanyahu says war 'ends faster than people think' + 3 war goals (nuclear, missile, freedom). Brent $119→$107. Fresh Tehran strikes overnight. Gulf states intercepted more missiles. 18,000+ Iranian civilians injured. Iran threatens 'complete destruction' of allied energy infra if targeted again. Updated 2026-03-20T07:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Iran MPs propose tolls/taxes on all shipping through Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: Iranian lawmakers propose legislation to impose tolls and taxes on ships passing through Strait of Hormuz — new economic blockade mechanism alongside physical interdiction.

latest_news.headline: Trump-Netanyahu split on South Pars: 'I told him don't do that'
latest_news.text: Trump confirms he neither agreed with nor approved Israel's South Pars strike. 'We get along great. It's coordinated, but on occasion he'll do something.' Daylight between the two leaders visible for first time.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 99% (stable). Day 21 auto - IMMINENT. Ground invasion past Litani ongoing. 1,000+ killed, 1M+ displaced. Central Beirut strikes. Bridges destroyed. Economist: Israel contemplates full ground invasion of Lebanon. Updated 2026-03-20T07:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys bridges over Litani River, 968+ killed in Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israeli warplanes destroy bridges over Litani River linking south Lebanon to rest of country. Death toll reaches 968+ (up from 912). Over 1 million displaced. UN says attacks may amount to war crimes.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 6% (stable). Day 21 auto - DETERRENT. 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace. NATO Patriot batteries deployed. Coupling from Iran conventional. Updated 2026-03-20T07:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 8% (stable). Day 21 auto - DETERRENT. No new developments. Border tension contained. Updated 2026-03-20T07:04:00Z

russia.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 3% (up). Day 21 auto - DETERRENT. Arms supplies to Iran ongoing. Oil price boost to Russian revenue. No direct intervention. Updated 2026-03-20T07:04:00Z

china.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 5% (stable). Day 21 auto - DETERRENT. US intel: no 2027 Taiwan invasion. Status quo. China mediating diplomatically. Updated 2026-03-20T07:04:00Z

north_korea.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 21 auto - DETERRENT. No activity. Kim tank drills (standard). Updated 2026-03-20T07:04:00Z

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 38% (stable). Day 21 auto - CRITICAL. Attacks dropped 85%. Peace talks paused due to Iran war. Oil price boost reduces Russian economic pressure. No new developments. Updated 2026-03-20T07:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: US-Russia-Ukraine peace talks formally paused due to Iran war
latest_news.text: No progress on Ukraine peace since Putin-Trump call (Mar 18). US diplomatic bandwidth consumed by Iran war. Russia benefits from oil price surge reducing economic pressure.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 38% (stable). Day 21 auto - CRITICAL. Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP 3-day truce. No fighting. Post-Eid resumption expected Mar 23. Updated 2026-03-20T07:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

top_signals: Day 21: Netanyahu says Israel acted alone on South Pars, Trump asked to halt energy strikes
Netanyahu: war 'will end a lot faster than people think' — 3 war goals outlined
Brent oil $119→$107 on Hormuz reopening signals but still +49% pre-war
18,000+ Iranian civilians injured, hundreds of children killed (Red Crescent)
Fresh Israeli strikes on Tehran overnight
Gulf states (UAE, Saudi, Kuwait, Bahrain) intercepted more Iranian missiles
Iran threatens 'complete destruction' of allied energy infra if targeted again
Three senior Iranian officials assassinated in 2 days (Larijani, Soleimani, Khatib)
Qatar LNG: 17% capacity cut, force majeure, years to recover
Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: WATCH: Day 20 Hour 06. Netanyahu says Israel will help US reopen Hormuz — first positive Hormuz signal from Israel. Trump halts Israeli energy strikes. Oil dropped from $119 to $108 on Hormuz reopening news. BUT: Iran MPs propose Hormuz tolls legislation, blockade continues. War rhetoric persists. Russia-Ukraine: attacks dropped 85% (50+/day → 7-10/day) but peace talks paused. Pakistan-Afghanistan: Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23.

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu: Israel acted alone on South Pars, Trump asked to halt energy strikes
latest_news.text: Netanyahu confirms Israel acted alone on Asaluyeh gas compound strike. Trump asked Israel to hold off on future attacks, Israel complying. Netanyahu says war 'ends faster than people think.'

latest_news.headline: 18,000+ Iranian civilians injured, hundreds of children killed in US-Israeli strikes
latest_news.text: Iranian Red Crescent reports 18,000+ civilians injured and hundreds of children killed in US-Israeli strikes. Massive humanitarian toll escalating.

latest_news.headline: Fresh Israeli strikes on Tehran overnight, Gulf states intercept more missiles
latest_news.text: Israel launched fresh strikes on Tehran overnight. UAE, Saudi, Kuwait, Bahrain intercepted additional Iranian missiles and drones.

latest_news.headline: Iran threatens 'complete destruction' of allied energy infrastructure if targeted again
latest_news.text: Iran's military threatens 'complete destruction' of US and allied energy infrastructure if Iranian energy facilities are targeted again. Zero restraint warning.

latest_news.headline: Brent oil drops $119→$107 but remains +49% above pre-war levels
latest_news.text: Brent crude eased from $119 peak to ~$107 after Netanyahu's Hormuz reopening pledge, but still massively elevated vs pre-war $72. Energy crisis deepening.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 21, 07:00 UTC) — Day 21 of Iran war. Netanyahu: Israel acted alone on South Pars, complying with Trump energy strike halt. War 'ends faster than people think' per Netanyahu — 3 goals: nuclear, missile, regime change. 18,000+ Iranian civilians injured. Fresh Tehran strikes overnight. Gulf states intercepting missiles. Brent $119→$107 but still +49%. Iran threatens 'complete destruction' of allied energy infra. Qatar LNG: 17% cut, years to recover. Russia-Ukraine: attacks dropped 85%, peace talks paused. Pakistan-Afghanistan: Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23. DPRK: quiet. China: quiet.
